'''鈭歞h-t-b''' ('''kadhatab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knep|knep]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knep|knep]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-t-b
|-
! Lemma
| kadhatab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thidhatab|thidhatab]] || [[word:jidhatab|jidhatab]] || [[word:shidhatab|shidhatab]] || [[word:kidhatab|kidhatab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthudhatab|thuthudhatab]] || [[word:jujudhatab|jujudhatab]] || [[word:shushudhatab|shushudhatab]] || [[word:kukudhatab|kukudhatab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thudhatab|thudhatab]] || [[word:judhatab|judhatab]] || [[word:shudhatab|shudhatab]] || [[word:kudhatab|kudhatab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thudhatab|thudhatab]] || [[word:judhatab|judhatab]] || [[word:shudhatab|shudhatab]] || [[word:kudhatab|kudhatab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thedhatab|thedhatab]] || [[word:jedhatab|jedhatab]] || [[word:shedhatab|shedhatab]] || [[word:kedhatab|kedhatab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothodhatab|thothodhatab]] || [[word:jojodhatab|jojodhatab]] || [[word:shoshodhatab|shoshodhatab]] || [[word:kokodhatab|kokodhatab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thodhatab|thodhatab]] || [[word:jodhatab|jodhatab]] || [[word:shodhatab|shodhatab]] || [[word:kodhatab|kodhatab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thodhatab|thodhatab]] || [[word:jodhatab|jodhatab]] || [[word:shodhatab|shodhatab]] || [[word:kodhatab|kodhatab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]] || [[word:dhatab|dhatab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙dhatab|th忙dhatab]] || [[word:j忙dhatab|j忙dhatab]] || [[word:sh忙dhatab|sh忙dhatab]] || [[word:k忙dhatab|k忙dhatab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathadhatab|thathadhatab]] || [[word:jajadhatab|jajadhatab]] || [[word:shashadhatab|shashadhatab]] || [[word:kakadhatab|kakadhatab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thadhatab|thadhatab]] || [[word:jadhatab|jadhatab]] || [[word:shadhatab|shadhatab]] || [[word:kadhatab|kadhatab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thadhatab|thadhatab]] || [[word:jadhatab|jadhatab]] || [[word:shadhatab|shadhatab]] || [[word:kadhatab|kadhatab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shadhatab|shadhatab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshadhatab|goshadhatab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishadhatab|gokishadhatab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shadhatabn眉|shadhatabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkn眉|goshadhatabnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatabn眉|gokishadhatabn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shadhatabsh毛|shadhatabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshadhatabnksh毛|goshadhatabnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishadhatabsh毛|gokishadhatabsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatabro|shadhatabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkro|goshadhatabnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatabro|gokishadhatabro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatabmu|shadhatabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkmu|goshadhatabnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatabmu|gokishadhatabmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shadhatabsher|shadhatabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshadhatabnksher|goshadhatabnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishadhatabsher|gokishadhatabsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shadhatabng|shadhatabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkng|goshadhatabnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishadhatabng|gokishadhatabng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shadhatabya|shadhatabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkya|goshadhatabnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishadhatabya|gokishadhatabya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shadhatabyam|shadhatabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkyam|goshadhatabnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishadhatabyam|gokishadhatabyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhatabn眉sh毛|shadhatabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkn眉sh毛|goshadhatabnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhatabn眉sh毛|gokishadhatabn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatabn眉ro|shadhatabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkn眉ro|goshadhatabnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatabn眉ro|gokishadhatabn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatabn眉mu|shadhatabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkn眉mu|goshadhatabnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatabn眉mu|gokishadhatabn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhatabsh毛n眉|shadhatabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatabnksh毛n眉|goshadhatabnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatabsh毛n眉|gokishadhatabsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatabsh毛ro|shadhatabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatabnksh毛ro|goshadhatabnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatabsh毛ro|gokishadhatabsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatabsh毛mu|shadhatabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatabnksh毛mu|goshadhatabnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatabsh毛mu|gokishadhatabsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhatabron眉|shadhatabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkron眉|goshadhatabnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatabron眉|gokishadhatabron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhatabrosh毛|shadhatabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkrosh毛|goshadhatabnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhatabrosh毛|gokishadhatabrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shadhatabromu|shadhatabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkromu|goshadhatabnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishadhatabromu|gokishadhatabromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shadhatabmun眉|shadhatabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkmun眉|goshadhatabnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishadhatabmun眉|gokishadhatabmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shadhatabmush毛|shadhatabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkmush毛|goshadhatabnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishadhatabmush毛|gokishadhatabmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shadhatabmuro|shadhatabmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshadhatabnkmuro|goshadhatabnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishadhatabmuro|gokishadhatabmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c6f8e69}}
